title: anthyllis vulneraria subsp. maritima
intro: Anthyllis vulneraria subsp. maritima, also known as marsh kidney vetch, is a subspecies of flowering plant in the legume family. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which make it effective in treating wounds, burns, and skin conditions such as eczema and acne. The plant's health benefits include reducing inflammation, promoting tissue repair, and fighting off infections, making it a valuable remedy for various skin issues. Anthyllis vulneraria subsp. maritima can be prepared as a herbal tea, tincture, or ointment, allowing individuals to utilize its medicinal properties in a form that suits their needs.
